positive: A minimalist, highly stylized geometric illustration of a celestial gathering. The composition features interlocking cosmic elements: crescent moons, stylized stars forming constellations, and ringed planets orbiting a central, abstract sun. The style should be modern geometric art meets mid-century modern poster design, using thick, clean lines and negative space. Color palette must be restricted to deep indigo, sapphire blue, burnished gold, and crisp cream white. The overall feel should be sophisticated, ethereal, and highly graphic, suitable for a central print on a t-shirt. Flat graphic design, vector art quality, high contrast, perfect symmetry, clean silhouette.
